title: Astronomy
recommendedTrackSummary: AST-2 is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 7 of the 9 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: AST-2 has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including MATH& 151, MATH& 152, PHYS& 221, MATH& 163, plus 3 more.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AST-2 does not cover by itself.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Minimum requirements for consideration for standard admission
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Parsed from an inline required course list; embedded alternatives are separate choice groups.

requirementGroup.label: Minimum requirements for consideration for standard admission
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: Minimum requirements for consideration for standard admission: PHYS 121, PHYS 122, and PHY 123 (or transfer equivalent; may be presently enrolled in PHYS 123), and either [MATH 124, MATH 125, and MATH 126] or [MATH 134 and MATH 135] (or full transfer equivalent; may be presently enrolled in MATH 126 or MATH 135). Students with greater than 2.0 in most required prerequisites are generally admitted to the major (although meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission).
